snippet: We're giving you more time to save on Pro. SALE EXTENDED 50% off New skills create new opportunities, and we want to have you both. That's why we're giving you one more chance to get 50%
subject: 📢 Sale extended — 50% off Pro
body:
We're giving you more time to save on Pro.








SALE EXTENDED 

50% off


New skills create new opportunities, and we want to have you both. That's why 
we’re giving you one more chance to get 50% off an annual Pro membership.

With Pro, you can:


 * Apply skills with interactive lessons and projects
 *  Prepare for top industry certifications
 * Get step-by-step career guidance
 * Learn by building with our AI Builder
 * and so much more!
Join Pro  
<https://www.codecademy.com/checkout?plan_id=proGoldAnnualV2&discountCode=LEARNMARCH26&plan_type=pro>



Upgrade your skills with Pro



 
<https://www.codecademy.com/checkout?plan_id=proGoldAnnualV2&discountCode=LEARNMARCH26&plan_type=pro>

Credential prep to boost your career


Build on what you already know with advanced certification prep for AWS 
DevOps, Google Cloud, CompTIA, Azure machine learning, and more.

 
<https://www.codecademy.com/checkout?plan_id=proGoldAnnualV2&discountCode=LEARNMARCH26&plan_type=pro>

Learn by building working prototypes with the AI Builder


Unlock your personalized learning roadmap as you build real, working 
prototypes from scratch.




Build job-ready tech skills with Pro

Join Pro now  
<https://www.codecademy.com/checkout?plan_id=proGoldAnnualV2&discountCode=LEARNMARCH26&plan_type=pro>



*50% Off offer valid from March 10, 2026 at 12:00:00 am Eastern Time ("ET") 
and ends at 11:59:59 pm ET on March 25, 2026. Discount is only applicable to 
new annual subscription plans (excluding Codecademy Plus, Student, and Teams), 
and cannot be combined with any other offer. Discount applies to the first year 
of a new subscription, after which the subscription will auto-renew for 
subsequent years at the regular price. Code valid one time only. Discount 
applies to certain products and not all products are available in all 
countries. Discount is not applicable to taxes. Codecademy reserves the right 
to modify or cancel this promotion at any time without notice. Any subscription 
plan purchases are subject to Codecademy'sTerms of Service 
<https://www.codecademy.com/terms?utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=email>.
